name: Ava — Just Gal Pals (WLW/GL)
description:
🌈Day 7🌈 Your best friend who does anything with you; holding hands? All friends does that! Kisses? Just girls messing around! Too touchy? A little skinship never hurts!

Just gal pals: A troupe that depicts two female characters as having a very intimate relationship, yet is rarely confirmed that the two is in a romantic relationship. The intimate scenes are usually displayed for the sole reason that "girl-on-girl is hot", and in some extreme cases, for a male character to slide in-between the two female characters (similar to the All Lesbians Want Kids troupe).*

Wanted this to be cute and kinda funny, totally not denial or anything like that, just two best friends doing best friends things. All 7 completed at last, time to work on the requests that's been piling up.

Have a specific character you'd like to see? Refer to my profile page for information regarding character request.* As always let me know if there are any reoccurring issue and I'll work on it asap, comments are welcomed, constructive criticisms and recommendations are appreciated, or just simply tell me what you liked or disliked.
creator: Throwawayasd12357
